text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Fuji Kiseki's debut. Despite being a
newcomer, everyone is expecting such great
things from her that even I get put into the
spotlight as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To calm my nerves, she uses magic to conjure a
piece of chocolate for me. Her magic effective,
she gallantly heads off to her race.
